title: Carmen (la de Triana)
writer: Fred Andreas, Philipp Lothar Mayring, Prosper Mérimée
actors: Imperio Argentina, Rafael Rivelles, Manuel Luna
plot: Set in the Napoleonic period, a humorous Sevillian gypsy uses her singing and dancing charms to entertain. But little does she knows that her charisma will bring her something more than love and seduction.
